/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/Magic8Ball.dir/Magic8Ball_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Magic8Ball.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Magic8Ball.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Magic8Ball.dir/magic8ball.cpp.o -o Magic8Ball  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
